items.title: Texas women used crow drones to fly drugs into Louisiana prison, authorities say
items.dek: Additional Sources: KALB WBRZ COLFAX, La - Two Texas women were arrested after authorities say they used a drone and plastic bird decoys to fly drugs and cellph
items.body: Additional Sources: KALB WBRZ COLFAX, La - Two Texas women were arrested after authorities say they used a drone and plastic bird decoys to fly drugs and cellphones into a federal prison in central Louisiana. The Grant Parish Sheriff’s Office intercepted the delivery, which involved plastic crow decoys stuffed with contraband and dropped onto the grounds of the unidentified federal facility. The suspects told investigators they were paid $40,000 to execute the smuggling operation. submitted by /u/TylerFortier_Photo [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Syrian ex-colonel in court on crimes against humanity charge
items.dek: Salem Michel Al-Salem, accused of crimes committed in Syria in 2011 and 2012, has been named for the first time.
